NumberOfMatchesInSample.description: The number of match groups in the domain that have been reviewed in this preview dry run.

NumberOfProfilesInSample.description: The number of profiles found in this preview dry run.

NumberOfProfilesWillBeMerged.description: The number of profiles that would be merged if this wasn't a preview dry run.

CalculatedAttributeName.description: The unique name of the calculated attribute.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the calculated attribute.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the calculated attribute definition was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the calculated attribute definition was most recently edited.

Statistic.description: The aggregation operation to perform for the calculated attribute.

Filter.description: The filter assigned to this calculated attribute definition.

Conditions.description: The conditions including range, object count, and threshold for the calculated attribute.

AttributeDetails.description: Mathematical expression and a list of attribute items specified in that expression.

UseHistoricalData.description: Whether historical data ingested before the Calculated Attribute was created should be included in calculations.

Status.description: Status of the Calculated Attribute creation (whether all historical data has been indexed).

Readiness.description: Information indicating if the Calculated Attribute is ready for use by confirming all historical data has been processed and reflected.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

CalculatedAttributeName.description: The unique name of the calculated attribute.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the calculated attribute.

IsDataPartial.description: Indicates whether the calculated attribute’s value is based on partial data. If data is partial, it is set to true.

LastObjectTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the newest object included in the calculated attribute calculation.

DefaultExpirationDays.description: The default number of days until the data within the domain expires.

DefaultEncryptionKey.description: The default encryption key, which is an AWS managed key, is used when no specific type of encryption key is specified. It is used to encrypt all data before it is placed in permanent or semi-permanent storage.

DeadLetterQueueUrl.description: The URL of the SQS dead letter queue, which is used for reporting errors associated with ingesting data from third party applications.

Matching.description:
The process of matching duplicate profiles. If Matching = true, Amazon Connect Customer Profiles starts a weekly batch process called Identity Resolution Job. If you do not specify a date and time for Identity Resolution Job to run, by default it runs every Saturday at 12AM UTC to detect duplicate profiles in your domains.

After the Identity Resolution Job completes, use the GetMatches API to return and review the results. Or, if you have configured ExportingConfig in the MatchingRequest, you can download the results from S3.

RuleBasedMatching.description: The process of matching duplicate profiles using the Rule-Based matching. If RuleBasedMatching = true, Amazon Connect Customer Profiles will start to match and merge your profiles according to your configuration in the RuleBasedMatchingRequest. You can use the ListRuleBasedMatches and GetSimilarProfiles API to return and review the results. Also, if you have configured ExportingConfig in the RuleBasedMatchingRequest, you can download the results from S3.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was most recently edited.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

IsDefault.description: If set to true for a layout, this layout will be used by default to view data. If set to false, then the layout will not be used by default, but it can be used to view data by explicitly selecting it in the console.

LayoutType.description: The type of layout that can be used to view data under a Customer Profiles domain.

Layout.description: A customizable layout that can be used to view data under a Customer Profiles domain.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the layout was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the layout was most recently updated.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

EventStreamArn.description: A unique identifier for the event stream.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the export was created.

State.description: The operational state of destination stream for export.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

EventTriggerName.description: The unique name of the event trigger.

ObjectTypeName.description: The unique name of the object type.

EventTriggerConditions.description: A list of conditions that determine when an event should trigger the destination.

SegmentFilter.description: The destination is triggered only for profiles that meet the criteria of a segment definition.

EventTriggerLimits.description: Defines limits controlling whether an event triggers the destination, based on ingestion latency and the number of invocations per profile over specific time periods.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the event trigger was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the event trigger was most recently updated.

Tags.description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.

JobId.description: The unique identifier of the Identity Resolution Job.

Status.description:
The status of the Identity Resolution Job.

  • PENDING: The Identity Resolution Job is scheduled but has not started yet. If you turn off the Identity Resolution feature in your domain, jobs in the PENDING state are deleted.

  • PREPROCESSING: The Identity Resolution Job is loading your data.

  • FIND_MATCHING: The Identity Resolution Job is using the machine learning model to identify profiles that belong to the same matching group.

  • MERGING: The Identity Resolution Job is merging duplicate profiles.

  • COMPLETED: The Identity Resolution Job completed successfully.

  • PARTIAL_SUCCESS: There's a system error and not all of the data is merged. The Identity Resolution Job writes a message indicating the source of the problem.

  • FAILED: The Identity Resolution Job did not merge any data. It writes a message indicating the source of the problem.

Message.description: The error messages that are generated when the Identity Resolution Job runs.

JobStartTime.description: The timestamp of when the Identity Resolution Job was started or will be started.

JobEndTime.description: The timestamp of when the Identity Resolution Job was completed.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the Identity Resolution Job was most recently edited.

JobExpirationTime.description: The timestamp of when the Identity Resolution Job will expire.

AutoMerging.description: Configuration settings for how to perform the auto-merging of profiles.

ExportingLocation.description: The S3 location where the Identity Resolution Job writes result files.

Uri.description: The URI of the S3 bucket or any other type of data source.

ObjectTypeName.description: The name of the profile object type.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was most recently edited.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

ObjectTypeNames.description: A map in which each key is an event type from an external application such as Segment or Shopify, and each value is an ObjectTypeName (template) used to ingest the event. It supports the following event types: SegmentIdentify, ShopifyCreateCustomers, ShopifyUpdateCustomers, ShopifyCreateDraftOrders, ShopifyUpdateDraftOrders, ShopifyCreateOrders, and ShopifyUpdatedOrders.

IsUnstructured.description: Boolean that shows if the Flow that's associated with the Integration is created in Amazon Appflow, or with ObjectTypeName equals _unstructured via API/CLI in flowDefinition.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role. The Integration uses this role to make Customer Profiles requests on your behalf.

EventTriggerNames.description: A list of unique names for active event triggers associated with the integration. This list would be empty if no Event Trigger is associated with the integration.

NextToken.description: If there are additional results, this is the token for the next set of results.

MatchGenerationDate.description: The timestamp this version of Match Result generated.

Matches.description: The list of matched profiles for this instance.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the profile history record.

ObjectTypeName.description: The name of the profile object type.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the profile history record was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the profile history record was last updated.

ActionType.description: The action type of the profile history record.

ProfileObjectUniqueKey.description: The unique identifier of the profile object generated by the service.

Content.description: A string containing the customer profile, profile object, or profile key content.

PerformedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the person or service principal who performed the action.

ObjectTypeName.description: The name of the profile object type.

Description.description: The description of the profile object type.

TemplateId.description: A unique identifier for the object template.

ExpirationDays.description: The number of days until the data in the object expires.

EncryptionKey.description: The customer-provided key to encrypt the profile object that will be created in this profile object type.

AllowProfileCreation.description: Indicates whether a profile should be created when data is received if one doesn’t exist for an object of this type. The default is FALSE. If the AllowProfileCreation flag is set to FALSE, then the service tries to fetch a standard profile and associate this object with the profile. If it is set to TRUE, and if no match is found, then the service creates a new standard profile.

SourceLastUpdatedTimestampFormat.description: The format of your sourceLastUpdatedTimestamp that was previously set up.

MaxAvailableProfileObjectCount.description: The amount of provisioned profile object max count available.

MaxProfileObjectCount.description: The amount of profile object max count assigned to the object type.

Fields.description: A map of the name and ObjectType field.

Keys.description: A list of unique keys that can be used to map data to the profile.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was most recently edited.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

TemplateId.description: A unique identifier for the object template.

SourceName.description: The name of the source of the object template.

AllowProfileCreation.description: Indicates whether a profile should be created when data is received if one doesn’t exist for an object of this type. The default is FALSE. If the AllowProfileCreation flag is set to FALSE, then the service tries to fetch a standard profile and associate this object with the profile. If it is set to TRUE, and if no match is found, then the service creates a new standard profile.

SourceLastUpdatedTimestampFormat.description: The format of your sourceLastUpdatedTimestamp that was previously set up.

Fields.description: A map of the name and ObjectType field.

Keys.description: A list of unique keys that can be used to map data to the profile.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the segment definition.

SegmentGroups.description: The segment criteria associated with this definition.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the segment definition was created.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

EstimateId.description: The QueryId which is the same as the value passed in QueryId.

Estimate.description: The estimated number of profiles contained in the segment.

Message.description: The error message if there is any error.

StatusCode.description: The status code of the segment estimate.

SegmentDefinitionName.description: The unique name of the segment definition.

Profiles.description: An array of maps where each contains a response per profile requested.

Failures.description: An array of maps where each contains a response per profile failed for the request.

SnapshotId.description: The unique identifier of the segment snapshot.

Status.description: The status of the asynchronous job for exporting the segment snapshot.

StatusMessage.description: The status message of the asynchronous job for exporting the segment snapshot.

DataFormat.description: The format in which the segment will be exported.

EncryptionKey.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key used to encrypt the exported segment.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that allows Customer Profiles service principal to assume the role for conducting KMS and S3 operations.

DestinationUri.description: The destination to which the segment will be exported. This field must be provided if the request is not submitted from the Amazon Connect Admin Website.

ProfileIds.description: Set of profileIds that belong to the same matching group.

MatchId.description: The string matchId that the similar profiles belong to.

MatchType.description: Specify the type of matching to get similar profiles for.

RuleLevel.description: The integer rule level that the profiles matched on.

ConfidenceScore.description: It only has value when the MatchType is ML_BASED_MATCHING.A number between 0 and 1, where a higher score means higher similarity. Examining match confidence scores lets you distinguish between groups of similar records in which the system is highly confident (which you may decide to merge), groups of similar records about which the system is uncertain (which you may decide to have reviewed by a human), and groups of similar records that the system deems to be unlikely (which you may decide to reject). Given confidence scores vary as per the data input, it should not be used as an absolute measure of matching quality.

NextToken.description: The pagination token from the previous GetSimilarProfiles API call.

JobId.description: The unique identifier of the upload job.

DisplayName.description: The unique name of the upload job. Could be a file name to identify the upload job.

Status.description:
The status describing the status for the upload job. The following are Valid Values:

  • CREATED: The upload job has been created, but has not started processing yet.

  • IN_PROGRESS: The upload job is currently in progress, ingesting and processing the profile data.

  • PARTIALLY_SUCCEEDED: The upload job has successfully completed the ingestion and processing of all profile data.

  • SUCCEEDED: The upload job has successfully completed the ingestion and processing of all profile data.

  • FAILED: The upload job has failed to complete.

  • STOPPED: The upload job has been manually stopped or terminated before completion.

StatusReason.description:
The reason for the current status of the upload job. Possible reasons:

  • VALIDATION_FAILURE: The upload job has encountered an error or issue and was unable to complete the profile data ingestion.

  • INTERNAL_FAILURE: Failure caused from service side

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the upload job was created.

CompletedAt.description: The timestamp when the upload job was completed.

Fields.description: The mapping between CSV Columns and Profile Object attributes for the upload job.

UniqueKey.description: The unique key columns used for de-duping the keys in the upload job.

ResultsSummary.description: The summary of results for the upload job, including the number of updated, created, and failed records.

DataExpiry.description: The expiry duration for the profiles ingested with the upload job.

Url.description: The pre-signed S3 URL for uploading the CSV file associated with the upload job.

ClientToken.description:
The plaintext data key used to encrypt the upload file.

To persist to the pre-signed url, use the client token and MD5 client token as header. The required headers are as follows:

  • x-amz-server-side-encryption-customer-key: Client Token

  • x-amz-server-side-encryption-customer-key-MD5: MD5 Client Token

  • x-amz-server-side-encryption-customer-algorithm: AES256

ValidUntil.description: The expiry timestamp for the pre-signed URL, after which the URL will no longer be valid.

WorkflowType.description: The type of workflow. The only supported value is APPFLOW_INTEGRATION.

StartDate.description: The timestamp that represents when workflow execution started.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp that represents when workflow execution last updated.

WorkflowType.description: The type of workflow. The only supported value is APPFLOW_INTEGRATION.
